title: Workplace head injury after pipe fell from derrick
description: At work on a drill rig, a pipe fell from the derrick and struck the patient on the head. Mechanism of injury documented as a work related head injury.
sourceExcerpt: DATE OF SERVICE: 03/08/2022. At work on a drill rig, a pipe fell from the derrick and struck the patient on the head. Mechanism of injury documented as a work related head injury.

title: Neurology follow-up with migraine medication changes
description: Neurology follow-up with migraine headaches. Topiramate dose was increased and follow-up was recommended.
sourceExcerpt: DATE OF SERVICE: 03/08/2022. Neurology follow-up with migraine medication changes. Topiramate dose was increased and follow-up was recommended.

title: Telephone follow-up for persistent migraines
description: OCR garble and persistent migraines noted, but this remains a telephone follow-up note rather than a historical trauma event.
sourceExcerpt: DATE OF SERVICE: 03/08/2022. Telephone follow-up for persistent migraines and postconcussive syndrome. OCR garble in the surrounding text.
